title: Drybrush Flat
description: Ce style d'illustration éditoriale contemporaine fusionne des blocs de couleurs plats et sans ombres avec des traits expressifs et texturés rappelant le fusain ou le pinceau sec numérique. L'esthétique repose sur un espace négatif prononcé, une dynamique spatiale strictement bidimensionnelle et des teintes pures et vibrantes sans dégradés ni éclairage directionnel, créant une identité graphique minimaliste mais hautement tactile.
description_en: This contemporary editorial illustration style merges flat, unshaded color blocking with expressive, rough-textured linework reminiscent of charcoal or digital dry brush media. The aesthetic relies on stark negative space, strict two-dimensional spatial dynamics, and pure, vibrant hues without gradients or directional lighting, creating a minimalist yet highly tactile graphic identity.
description_fr: Ce style d'illustration éditoriale contemporaine fusionne des blocs de couleurs plats et sans ombres avec des traits expressifs et texturés rappelant le fusain ou le pinceau sec numérique. L'esthétique repose sur un espace négatif prononcé, une dynamique spatiale strictement bidimensionnelle et des teintes pures et vibrantes sans dégradés ni éclairage directionnel, créant une identité graphique minimaliste mais hautement tactile.
prompt: Contemporary digital editorial illustration utilizing flat color blocking and textured linework. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies strictly on unshaded, two-dimensional shapes filled with pure, solid hues, avoiding any gradients, volumetric shading, or directional lighting. Color logic is driven by broad areas of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, punctuated by sharp graphic details in {{accent_color}}. The defining feature is the contouring: loose, organic, expressive black linework that mimics the tactile friction of charcoal, chalk, or a digital dry brush. These rough, textured outlines vary in pressure and thickness, sometimes slightly misregistering with the underlying flat color blocks to create an offset printmaker's effect. The rough contour lines often float independently, defining boundaries while allowing the flat color pools of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} to bleed slightly or sit loosely within the forms. Edges of the color fills are mostly sharp but carry a subtle granular noise where they meet stark negative space. The composition operates on a strictly flat 2D plane with no forced perspective or realistic depth cues, relying instead on overlapping shapes and graphic hierarchy. Lighting is completely omitted; the scene is illuminated uniformly by the high-key brightness of the raw colors themselves. The atmosphere is minimalist, modern, and highly legible. The image must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space as a strict canvas rule: no borders, no frames, no white margins, no canvas edges, extending full bleed to all four corners.

background_prompt: An expansive, minimalist 2D landscape rendered in a contemporary editorial illustration style. The environment features sweeping, unshaded flat plains of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, devoid of any gradients or directional lighting. Rough, charcoal-textured black linework defines abstract environmental shapes, horizons, and subtle terrain details. The atmosphere is stark, modern, and graphic, with vibrant pops of {{accent_color}} scattered across the flat spatial plane, creating a highly legible, textured digital environment without any focal subjects.
background_prompt_removebg: An expansive, minimalist 2D landscape rendered in a contemporary editorial illustration style. The environment features sweeping, unshaded flat plains of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, devoid of any gradients or directional lighting. Rough, charcoal-textured black linework defines abstract environmental shapes, horizons, and subtle terrain details. The atmosphere is stark, modern, and graphic, with vibrant pops of {{accent_color}} scattered across the flat spatial plane, creating a highly legible, textured digital environment without any focal subjects. This environmental scene and its textured borders transition sharply into the flat {{background_color}} surface, with the charcoal-like framing elements bleeding organically into the solid backdrop.
